## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` is clean
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] Works under all three presets (Studio, Voltage, Bloom)
- [ ] Works in light **and** dark mode
- [ ] Works under `TextDirection.rtl`
- [ ] No hard-coded colours/spacing/text styles (reads from `BankThemeData` / `BankTokens`)
- [ ] No bundled illustrations added
- [ ] Screenshots regenerated (if the change is visual)
